assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 extracts the Upstream Affected Component (webpack) from customfield_10632 and uses it to search for related CVE Jiras (§1.59)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md line 17: 'Extracted from TC-8011's customfield_10632: webpack'. Lines 21-23 show JQL query 'cf[10632] ~ webpack' used to search for related CVE Jiras, returning TC-8012.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 filters search results by matching PS Component (customfield_10669 = pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui) and Stream (customfield_10832 = rhtpa-2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 34-38 explicitly filter TC-8012 by PS Component (customfield_10669: pscomponent:org/rhtpa-ui -- MATCHES) and Stream (customfield_10832: rhtpa-2.2 -- MATCHES). TC-8012 passes the filter.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 traverses issuelinks on TC-8012 to find remediation task TC-8013 via the 'Depend' link type
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md line 43: 'Inspecting TC-8012's issuelinks array for linked remediation Tasks with link type Depend'. Line 45: 'Link found: Depend -> TC-8013 (remediation Task)' with summary 'Bump webpack to 5.96.1 in rhtpa-ui [rhtpa-2.2]'.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.3 compares the remediation task's bump version (5.96.1) against the current CVE's fix threshold (5.98.0) and determines the fix does NOT cover this CVE
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 53-58: Table shows current CVE fix threshold = 5.98.0, existing remediation bump version = 5.96.1, comparison = '5.96.1 < 5.98.0', verdict = 'NOT COVERED -- the existing remediation does NOT meet this CVE's fix threshold'.

assertion_results.text: The overlap table is presented to the engineer showing TC-8012 and TC-8013 with 'Covers This CVE? = No' — the triage proceeds to create new remediation tasks rather than recommending closure
assertion_results.evidence: overlap-check.md lines 66-68: Overlap table shows TC-8012 / TC-8013 / 5.96.1 / 'No (threshold: 5.98.0)'. Line 70: 'Proceeding with new remediation task creation.' triage-outcome.md line 5: 'Decision: Proceed with new remediation task creation (Case A -- Affected)'.
